name: Campus North Plus Running Shoes
reviews.text:
I recently bought these running shoes, and I'm reallyimpressed with the comfort and quality. The cushioning is perfect - it absorbs impact really well and makes running or even walking long distances much easier on the feet. The grip is solid, even on slightly wet surfaces, and the shoes feel lightweight but still sturdy.They also fit true to size and have great breathability, so my feet don't feel sweaty after a long run. The design looks sleek and stylish too, so I can easily wear them casually as well. Overall, totally worth the price - perfect for daily runs or workouts. Highly recommended!

name: Campus North Plus Running Shoes
reviews.text:
This is a nice shoe, very light and comfortable. Actually I bought it as a running shoe, but in the first month itself it's entire usable heal got worn off revealing the hard plastic capsule. I did a minor diy job sticking a shaped piece of bicycle tyre at the heal with superglue. Now it's the tenth month and definitely more than a thousand kilometres, it's going strong.😃
